thresholds.rationale: Initial floor below the first local native smoke measurement for the seven-column legal action tree.
Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 146481.22 actions/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native baseline remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
Initial floor below the first local native smoke measurement for Rust-projected public board views.

Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 30493.56 projections/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native baseline remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
Initial floor below the first local native smoke measurement for replay JSON serialization round trips.
Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 2878.89 replays/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native baseline remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 5938.52 games/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native target miss remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
Initial floor below the first local native smoke measurement for seeded random legal selection.
Variance-aware floor more than 15% below the minimum 1370.21 decisions/sec observed across runs 27101213584/27111487150/27114668009; native baseline remains documented in BENCHMARKS.md per ADR 0005.
